home.heroTagline: Where the flavors of Morocco come alive
home.heroSubtitle: Luxury riad & authentic Moroccan dining in the heart of Fes
home.welcomeText: Nestled in the prestigious Ain Azliten neighborhood of Fes, Riad Sidi is a fully renovated luxury traditional riad offering authentic Moroccan hospitality with modern comfort. From our ornate mosaic courtyards to our panoramic rooftop terrace, every corner of Riad Sidi tells the story of Fes.
home.roomsSubtitle: Each room is a sanctuary of traditional Moroccan craftsmanship
home.restaurantSubtitle: Where the flavors of Morocco come alive
home.restaurantText: Experience the culinary traditions of Fez at Restaurant Soultana, located within the riad. Our chefs craft authentic Fassi dishes using fresh, locally-sourced ingredients and time-honored recipes passed down through generations.
home.servicesSubtitle: Everything you need for an unforgettable stay in Fes
home.blogSubtitle: Discover Moroccan culture, cuisine, and travel through our blog
home.ctaText: Contact us to book your stay or reserve a table at Restaurant Soultana

about.title: About Riad Sidi
about.subtitle: The Little Palace of Ain Azliten

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Luxury comfort wrapped in authentic Moroccan tradition
rooms.allRooms: All rooms include private bathroom, complimentary WiFi, and access to the riad's common areas and rooftop terrace.

restaurant.title: Restaurant Soultana
restaurant.subtitle: Authentic Fassi cuisine in the heart of Fes
restaurant.aboutText: Restaurant Soultana offers a unique dining experience rooted in the culinary traditions of Fez. Our menus are carefully crafted to showcase the rich flavors and textures of Moroccan cooking, using fresh, locally-sourced, premium ingredients prepared by traditional methods.
restaurant.simpleMenuDesc: Order à la carte — choose your appetizer, main dish, and dessert freely from our full menu.
restaurant.specialMenuDesc: A curated set menu experience. Includes Moroccan Salad, your choice of main dish, Seasonal Fruit, and Moroccan Mint Tea.
restaurant.showMenuDesc: The full Special Menu experience with live entertainment — music and cultural performance during your meal.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect stay in Fes
services.transfersDesc: Private and group transportation to and from Fes–Saïss Airport and train stations, with optional multilingual guides.
services.toursDesc: Private and group excursions through the ancient Fes Medina and surrounding region, tailored to your interests.
services.cookingDesc: Learn to prepare traditional Moroccan dishes in our restaurant kitchen — an unforgettable hands-on cultural experience.
services.entertainmentDesc: Enjoy live music and cultural performances during your dinner at Restaurant Soultana.
services.transportDesc: Free pick-up and drop-off to and from nearby hotels and accommodations upon request.
